content.claim: Roma segregation in Hungarian education is documented as a distinct legal-systemic issue with ongoing violations confirmed by the European Court of Human Rights and 2024 research, requiring separate policy responses from general tracking structure reform.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Roma segregation and gimnázium track selectivity overlap but are not identical policy problems
Legal and historical remediation timelines differ from structural system reforms
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
